title: Add some missing sqlite3 symbols, take  2
author: devdanzin
body:
This PR targets py3.9 and adds:

- sqlite3.SQLITE_CREATE_VTABLE
- sqlite3.SQLITE_DROP_VTABLE
- sqlite3.SQLITE_FUNCTION
- sqlite3.SQLITE_RECURSIVE
- sqlite3.SQLITE_SAVEPOINT

Addresses part of #4962.

comments.author: mattip
comments.body: I will merge this to py3.10

comments.author: mattip
comments.body: Whoops, you targeted `branches/py3.9`, it should have been `py3.9`. Sorry about that. I will cherry-pick this into py3.9 and merge to py3.10.
